generated_oml:
instance EngineTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermocouple sensor mounted on the internal combustion engine to capture engine temperature in real‑time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EngineTempDataTrans
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed encoder sensor attached to each wheel to measure rotational velocity under road‑contact conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTrans
]

instance VibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Accelerometer mounted on the vehicle chassis to capture vibration signatures indicative of mechanical integrity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VibrationDataTrans
]

instance EngineTempDataTrans : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EngineTemperatureSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTrans : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance VibrationDataTrans : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VibrationSensor
]

instance EngineTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous time‑series of engine temperature readings captured from EngineTemperatureSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EngineTempDataTrans
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous time‑series of wheel speed measurements captured from WheelSpeedSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTrans
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance VibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous time‑series of chassis vibration measurements captured from VibrationSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VibrationDataTrans
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance StaticDesignModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the vehicle’s chassis and wheel assembly derived from CAD blueprints"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance EngineDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential‑equation based dynamic model capturing the engine’s response to control inputs and external load"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalMappingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model mapping raw sensor data (temperature, speed, vibration) to derived physical state variables (e.g., thermal load, mechanical stress)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance CalibrationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Parameter estimation model that calibrates engine dynamics based on observed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance MonitoringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State estimator model that reconstructs hidden system states from available sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
]

instance OptimizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Optimization model that determines optimal engine and vehicle parameters to improve efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimizationEnabler
]

instance FaultDetectionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Anomaly detector model that identifies deviations from nominal behavior across temperature, speed, and vibration data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance SupervisoryControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Decision‑making model that evaluates potential corrective actions based on fault detections and performance targets"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SupervisoryControlEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool that ingests sensor data streams to update the dynamic and analytical models for calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool that runs monitoring algorithms on calibrated models to enforce safety and performance constraints"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Solver that executes optimization algorithms to compute parameter settings for improved vehicle efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Detection engine that flags anomalies in sensor data streams for further analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control logic that issues corrective commands to the vehicle systems when violations are detected"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs continuous calibration of the physical‑to‑virtual models using incoming sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResultInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that continuously monitors modeled vehicle behavior against safety and performance constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyComplianceInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides real‑time predictive simulation of vehicle behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal parameter settings using the OptimizationModel"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationResultInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that identifies and reports faults based on the FaultDetectionModel"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that issues corrective actions to the vehicle operators or automated actuators"
    DTDFVocab:provides CorrectiveCommandAction
]

instance CalibrationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating updated model parameters after calibration against sensor data"
]

instance SafetyComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming that the vehicle’s current state satisfies all safety constraints"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing predictive simulation results for current operating conditions"
]

instance OptimizationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detailing suggested optimal parameters to increase efficiency"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying detected fault conditions in the vehicle"
]

instance CorrectiveCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic corrective command issued to the vehicle’s control systems upon fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Chassis, Engine, Wheel
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary structural frame of the vehicle providing support and mounting for wheels and engine"
]

instance Engine : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Internal combustion engine that powers the vehicle through fuel combustion"
]

instance Wheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Wheel assembly composed of rim, tire, hub, and bearing, transmitting vehicle motion to the road surface"
]
